• CppServerstars601 - Ultra fast and low latency asynchronous socket server & client C++ library with support TCP, SSL, UDP, HTTP, HTTPS, WebSocket protocols and 10K connections problem solution. [MIT]
• C-Turtlestars12 - A C++11 header-only turtle graphics library acting as a CImg wrapper. [MIT]
• libassstars518 - Portable subtitle renderer for the ASS/SSA subtitle format. [ISC]
• PhysXstars2.2k - An open-source realtime physics engine middleware SDK developed by Nvidia as a part of Nvidia GameWorks software suite. [BSD-3-Clause]
• Bitserystars530 - Header only C++ binary serialization library. [MIT]
• FastBinaryEncodingstars435 - Fast Binary Encoding is ultra fast and universal serialization solution for C++, C#, Go, Java, JavaScript, Kotlin, Python, Ruby, Swift. [MIT]
• oat++stars3.8k - Light, zero-dependency framework to create high-performance web-services. [Apache-2.0] website
• paiza.io - An online C/C++ compiler with multiple files supporting feature, Github(gist) integration and collaborative editing.
• Fluent C++
• Image-based profiling for drug discovery: due for a machine-learning upgrade? - 2020 review of applications in image-based profiling from a Carpenter lab/pharma perspective.

• Expanding the antibacterial selectivity of polyether ionophore antibiotics through diversity-focused semisynthesis - Poulsen lab paper from 2020 where antibiotics are tested for their ability to leave mammalian cells as intact as possible, per the Cell Painting assay.
• Charts.css - CSS data visualization framework.
• reaviz - Modular chart component library for React.
• reaflow - Modular diagram engine for build static or interactive editors.
• lit-linestars5 - {fast, small, interactive, fully responsive} Line Chart web component build on top of lit-html.
• react-muzestars8 - React wrapper for muze (free data visualization library for creating exploratory data visualizations in browser, using WebAssembly)
• QuickChartstars1.1k - Web API that renders static chart images.
• react-visstars7.8k - a composable visualization system by Uber
• vx collection of reusable low-level visualization components, on top of d3
• μPlotstars6.2k - A small (< 25 KB min), fast chart for time series, lines, areas, ohlc & bars.

• Delphi Encryption Compendium (DEC)stars91. [Delphi] Cryptographic library for Delphi & C++ Builder. Symmetric cryptographic functions: Blowfish, Twofish, IDEA, Cast128, Cast256, Mars, RC2, RC4, RC5, RC6, Rijndael / AES, Square, SCOP, Sapphire, 1DES, 2DES, 3DES, 2DDES, 3DDES, 3TDES, 3Way, Gost, Misty, NewDES, Q128, SAFER, Shark, Skipjack, TEA, TEAN; Block cipher modes of operation: CTSx, CBCx, CFB8, CFBx, OFB8, OFBx, CFSx, ECBx; Hashes: MD2, MD4, MD5, RipeMD128, RipeMD160, RipeMD256, RipeMD320, SHA, SHA1, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, Haval128, Haval160, Haval192, Haval224, Haval256, Tiger, Panama, Whirlpool, Whirlpool1, Square, Snefru128, Snefru256, Sapphire.

• DebugEnginestars139. [Delphi] Collection of utilities related to debug stuff (stack trace, CPU registers snapshot, debug info, ...). Accessing Delphi debug info, Getting address of symbol from its name, Delphi map parsing and map converter to binary format, Smart stack trace, Delphi exception stack trace hook...
• vim-vtoolsstars6 - V tools for Vim, including auto formatting.
• vlang-sublimestars16 - Sublime text 3 Support for the Vlang Programming Language.
• Emulicious - Provides accurate emulation and includes powerful tools such as a profiler and source-level debugging for ASM and C via a VS Code debug adapter.
• Retr0 GB - An engine for creating games (expands GBDK).
• GBExtended - C library extending gbdk.
• gbdk-lib-extensionstars10 - A small set of sources and tools for the Game Boy Development Kit by Michael Hope.
• Dot Matrix Game Editor - An IDE for Game Boy programming in a C-like language called GBL, with many other features like tile and map extraction, WLA-DX assembly, and more.
• mgbdisstars138 - Game Boy ROM disassembler with RGBDS compatible output.
• ROM Header Utility - An online tool to inspect and modify a ROM's header data, including the logo.
• romusagestars4 - Command line tool for estimating usage (free space) of Game Boy ROMs from a .map, .noi or ihx file. Works with GBDK-2020 and RGBDS.
• awakestars47 - Game Boy decompiler.
• Game Boy Text Toolsstars7 - Set of tools for text manipulation and translation of Game Boy ROMs written in Node.js.
• Harry Mulder's GB Development - Some sources and home of Game Boy Tile Designer (GBTD) and Game Boy Map Builder (GBMB) tools.
• Tilemap Studiostars104 - A tilemap editor for Game Boy, Color, Advance, and SNES projects. Written in C++ with FLTK.
• cart-dumperstars18 - Game Boy Cartridge Dumper ROM.
• gbcamextractstars29 - Extracts photos from Game Boy Camera saves.
• Game Boy LCD sniffingstars131 - Sniff your Game Boy's LCD using a logic analyzer.
• swapdumpstars1 - Diagnostic utility for Game Boy flashcarts.
• Gameboy-LinkUpstars3 - Game Boy LinkUp serial cable networking project.
• Petrisstars9 - A puzzle game of shapely pets for the Game Boy Color (itch.io).
• buckwheatstars17 - Multi-language tokenizer for extracting identifiers from source code.
• astminerstars144 - Library and tool for mining of path-based representations of code and other data derived from ASTs.
• RefactoringMinerstars182 - Library/API for detection of refactorings in changes of Java code.
• SvelteScaling - Does Svelte Scale?
• Will it Scale?stars105 - Finding Svelte's inflection point.
• sveltejs/templatestars1.1k - Template for building basic applications with rollup.
• component-templatestars404 - A base for building shareable components.
• svelte-component-templatestars233 - A base for building shareable components.

• svelte-redux-toolkitstars2 - A starter template integrating Redux-Toolkit.
• svelte-ts-eslint-prettier-templatestars9 - Starter template with TS activated, and ESLint and Prettier working together.
• sapper-template#rollup - The default Sapper template, available for Rollup.
• sapper-template#webpack - The default Sapper template, available for Webpack.

• sapper-firebase-typescript-graphql-tailwindcss-actions-templatestars111 - Template that includes Sapper, Firebase functions and hosting, TypeScript and TypeGraphQL, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, and automatic building and deployment with GitHub Actions.
• sapper-mdsvex-templatestars12 - The default Sapper template with mdsvex.
• sapper-tailwindcss-templatestars77 - The default Sapper template with Tailwind CSS.
• sapper-typescript-graphql-templatestars87 - Template that includes Sapper, TypeScript preprocessing, and a GraphQL server through TypeGraphQL.
• email-verifierstars224 - A Go library for email verification without sending any emails.
• abbreviatestars163 - abbreviate is a tool turning long strings in to shorter ones with configurable seperaters, for example to embed branch names in to deployment stack IDs.
